plugins.name: skills-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit for authoring and validating Claude Code skills and agents. Adds agent-author for build/edit/package, agent-validator with a version-sync gate, plus 13 templates. Auto-invoke on 'create skill', 'validate agent', 'build agent'.

plugins.name: terminal-setup-macos
plugins.description: Idempotent macOS terminal installer for Ghostty, Oh My Zsh, Powerlevel10k, Glow, MesloLGS Nerd Font, plus optional markdown preview and clickable-path extras.

plugins.name: update-readme
plugins.description: Type-driven README updater. Detects repo family, confirms it with the user, asks for style, audience, and depth, then generates from the matching template workflow. Auto-invoke on 'update readme' and 'refresh readme'.

plugins.name: standalone-skills
plugins.description: Self-contained, Cowork-ready skills with no cross-skill or external plugin dependencies. Currently bundles diy-build-companion: plan and run DIY builds with energy-aware work blocks, cross-device Google Drive state, and a child-safety veto gate.

plugins.name: opencode-sync
plugins.description: Keep one canonical agent ecosystem usable on both Claude Code and OpenCode: generate OpenCode agents/commands/MCP from Claude sources, validate both runtimes' rules, detect drift, and ingest marketplaces or repos for OpenCode.

plugins.name: enablement-html-renderer
plugins.description: Packages finished enablement material into one self-contained HTML file where the reader toggles format: bullets, prose, visual diagram, comic, or cheat sheet. Theme-aware diagrams, URL auto-linking, and an AI-ism voice gate.
